testcase.name: contextLoads

22:19:59.831 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.smartcampus.smart_campus_backend.SmartCampusBackendApplicationTests]: SmartCampusBackendApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:19:59.974 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.smartcampus.smart_campus_backend.SmartCampusBackendApplication for test class com.smartcampus.smart_campus_backend.SmartCampusBackendApplicationTests 22:20:00.230 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
